title: Support for the Government of Yemen: joint communiqué
body: "On 20 January 2025 Hamish Falconer, Minister for North Africa and the Middle East visited the United Nations to call for full implementation of the Israel-Hamas ceasefire deal. He also announced the launch of a UK-led initiative to provide financial and political support for Yemen’s future.  Known as ‘TAFFY’, the initiative will include a technical assistance fund, and  bring the international community together to support governance in Yemen.  This document is the UK-Yemen joint communiqué following the co-hosted event for establishing international support for the Government of Yemen.   Read the related press release: Gaza ceasefire “moment of hope”, UK Minister to tell UN - GOV.UK.  "

taxons.title: Peace and stability in the Middle East and North Africa
